final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing marketing poster for a social media cover announcing GPT-image-2 launch on Lovart platform.

Style/medium: editorial magazine cover aesthetic, high-fashion layout sensibility, clean graphic design
Composition: diagonal composition with dynamic visual flow from corner to corner, balanced asymmetry
Subject: bold typographic announcement featuring "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart" as hero text, modern sans-serif type hierarchy
Scene/backdrop: minimal abstract background with subtle geometric elements or gradient field
Lighting/mood: high contrast dramatic lighting, editorial magazine atmosphere
Color palette: high-contrast accent colors, limited palette with one bold accent against neutral base
Text (verbatim): "GPT-image-2", "Lovart"
Constraints: must work as 小红书 cover format; text must remain legible at thumbnail size; diagonal energy must not compromise readability
Avoid: cluttered layout, low contrast text, generic stock imagery, Behance overused templates, 8K stuffer aesthetic
